title: agent-heartbeat-v1
description: Agent liveness and status heartbeat emitted periodically by orchestration runtime. Producer: canopy (heartbeat writer). Consumer: annulus (liveness view), cap (agent status dashboard).

written_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when heartbeat was written.

status.description: Current agent status. running = actively executing work, waiting = blocked or paused, idle = ready but no work assigned, error = recovery mode after failure.

current_task.description: Short description of active task or null if no task is active.

active_handoff.description: Handoff slug (e.g., 'implement-feature-x') if executing a specific handoff, or null.

consecutive_failures.description: Count of consecutive failures. Resets to 0 on any success; increments on any tool or step error.

total_turns.description: Lifetime turn count for this agent instance.

pid.description: Process ID of the running agent, or null if not applicable.

session_id.description: Hyphae session ID if this agent has an active session, or null.
